roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:MELISSA MOONEY APPEARS UNDER THE SUPERVISION OFTHOMAS OSTLY/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/DEFT WV CPX/WIT SWORN: SGT, STEPHEN JONAS/WIT SWORN: OFFICER LOUIS HAREGRAVES  /EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 1 - LARGE MANILA ENVELOPE MARKED WITH REPORT NUMBER & NAMEOF DEFENDANT; PEOPLE'S 1A - SMALL PLASTIC BAGGIE WITH CRYSTALLINE SUBSTANCE/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/HTA1:2/X:BASED UPON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED AT THE PRELIMINARY HEARING, THE COMPLAINT IS CONFORMED TO PROOF, THE COURT REDUCES AND CERTIFIES THE OFFENSES OF VC 10851(A) AND HS 11377(A), MISDEMEANORS, TO THE SUPERIOR COURT,/DEF:REMAINS ON SURETY BOND/
